NOTICE OF MOTION (TRANSACTION ID # 60236710) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK HEARING SET FOR APR-04-2017 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AND THE CLERK OF THE COURT IS DIRECTED TO RETURN THE $90 THAT DISCOVER BANK PAID FOR THIS MOTION. THE SECOND SENTENCE OF CCP 1032(B)(2) IS INAPPLICABLE BECAUSE DISCOVER BANK IS ENTITLED TO A PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF A JUDGMENT IN EXCESS OF $5000, THE APPLICABLE SMALL CLAIMS COURT JURISDICTIONAL LIMITATION TO IT. THE COURT SIGNS THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302)
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-04-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IDEMNE, JAMES $6,944.35 PRINCIPAL, $403.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,347.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60472461)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Discover Bank's motion to enter default and default judgment is granted and the clerk of the court is directed to return the $90 that Discover Bank paid for this motion. The second sentence of CCP 1032(b)(2) is inapplicable because Discover Bank is entitled to a principal amount of a judgment in excess of $5000, the applicable small claims court jurisdictional limitation to it. THE COURT SIGNS THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2017 Continued To May-16-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Continued To Feb-07-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
